history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, overhead shot of a person lying down in a field of small white and pink wildflowers. The person is wearing a black balaclava that covers their head and neck, with only their eyes visible. They are also wearing a light grey, hooded jacket with a zipper down the front. A grey utility vest is worn over the jacket, holding a clear bottle of AQUA brand water on the left side and a matte black water bottle on the right side. The background is filled with lush green foliage and numerous small daisy-like flowers with white petals and yellow centers, as well as some with pinkish-purple petals. The lighting is bright and sunny, casting soft shadows, suggesting a daytime outdoor setting. The overall mood is serene and contemplative, with a hint of mystery due to the obscured face. The color palette is dominated by natural greens, whites, and muted pinks, contrasted with the black of the balaclava and the grey of the clothing. The style is realistic, with a focus on natural elements and the human subject.
